name: 7'x10' Block Print Floral Outdoor Rug Red - Threshold™
description:
Accentuate the look and feel of your traditionally inspired outdoor seating space with this Block-Print Floral Outdoor Rug from Threshold™. Featuring a flat-pile construction with spray latex backing to help keep it comfortably underfoot, this decorative outdoor rug features a woven design for an elegant look. Showcasing a block-printed floral print in a distressed finish, this outdoor area rug brings eye-catching flair and warmth to your space. Use it to decorate your porch, deck or patio for an inviting feel.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
